title: Wireless Gaming Keyboard Mouse Combo,2.4G Wireless Rechargeable Backlit Keyboard+Optical 1600DPI Soundless Mouse with USB Receiver for Home Office Game Windows 2000/ME/XP/Vista/7/8/10,Mac (Pink)
description:
♐
The Multimedia Function Keys provides easy access to media,volume control,etc
【FN+F1】Music,【FN+F2】Volume-,【FN+F3】Volume+ 【FN+F4】Mute, 【FN+F5】Previous Track,【FN+F6】Next Track 【FN+F7】Play/Pause,【FN+F8】CD Stop,【FN+F9】Web browser  【FN+F10】Mailbox,【FN+F11】Computer,【FN+F12】Favorites 【FN+scrolk】Turn on/off backlight,【FN+pgup】Increase brightness 【FN+pgdn】Reduce brightness
Product detail information
Mouse Rated Working Current:≤10MA Keyboard Rated Working Current:≤40MA Optical Resolution:800-1200-1600 DPI Frequency:2402-2408MAZ Maximum Acceleration:14 inches per second Work Channel:34 channel frequency hopping Operating System:Windows Mac OS Working Voltage:DC 5V USB Interface:1.1/2.0 ♐
Keyboard Mouse Matching Mode
Since some computer cpus cannot recognize the universal 2.4G multi-threaded wireless universal driver some computers may not work properly with the keyboard or mouse ●When the keyboard is not working properly Press the 【ESC+K】button at the same time until the keyboard indicator begins to flash then plug in the USB receiver until the keyboard indicator stops flashing(driver identification match is complete) You can use the wireless keyboard normally ●When the mouse is not working properly Please insert the USB receive then press the 【Scroll Wheel+ Right Button】for 3-5 seconds at the same time,your wireless moue adaptation is completed You can use the wireless mouse normally
Note
➊The 2.4G USB receiver is stored inside the mouse and can be taken out for use ➋There is a ON/OFF switch at the bottom of mouse ➌ It support Windows 2000/ME/XP/Vista/7/8/10,Mac OS X ◕‿◕｡ If there is any questions,pls contact with us freely.we will offer you best service.thanks for your visiting Soseeln shop If you love it ,then ADD TO CART now
features: 【Bright Backlit Keyboard】Its backlight design makes your keyboard look cool at night.［Fn+Scrlk］turn on/off the backlight［Fn+Pgup］luminance+［Fn+Pgdn］luminance-.There are 3 levels of brightness

【Rechargeable keyboard & mouse】They both can get a quick charging with the USB cable,(Fully charged about 2-3 hours ),No need to replace batteries,convenient and environmental.(Pls charge the product for 12 hours before first use to activate the built-in battery)

【Wireless 2.4G Driver-free】This keyboard and mouse set adopts advanced 2.4GHz wireless technology,and the wireless distance up to 10m( 33ft);Share a usb receiver,plug and play,and high quality USB interface can provide efficient and stable data transmission

【Auto Sleep Design,Power Saving】Adopt the industry's top chip, which is 5 times power-saving than ordinary keyboard mouse combo.The mouse auto into sleep mode for 8 minutes not use, the keyboard is 5 minutes,the backlight turn off,and press any key to wake up

【High Quality and Good Choice】104 dual-color injection keys,long time use without discoloration;12 combinations of multimedia shortcut keys;3 adjustable DPI levels(800-1200-1600),control your own cursor speed freely. The mouse use aluminum alloy 3D non-slip roller,very comfortable

reviews.title: Excellent keyboard and mouse for the price
reviews.text: I was not looking for a gaming keyboard just wanted a backlit, wireless keyboard.  The lights in my home office hurt my eyes so when I need to work after dark all I really need is the screen on for light.  This keyboard allows me to work anytime without turning the lights on.  Easy to charge and can charge it while using it.

reviews.title: Sweet Keyboard
reviews.text: This is a great wireless keyboard.  The range is great and the backlit is very helpful in low light situations, plus it looks really cool.  Had some issues with the keyboard after return period had passed.  I contacted the seller thinking it wouldn't go anywhere.  I was wrong!  They returned my email quickly and was eager to resolve my problem, which they did.  I am extremely pleased with the keyboard and customer support I received.

title: Doohoeek Updated Retro Typewriter Keyboard with White Lighting, Muti-Device Multi-OS Bluetooth & Wired Mechanical Keyboard for Laptops, Vintage Keyboard with Cradle for Mac OS/iOS/Windows/Android
features: New Version for More Flexibility: The 2022 updated typewriter keyboard is compatible with more operating system (MacOS and iOS) and also simplify the connectivity and switch process with easy connect switch button.

Retro Typewriter Style Design: The wood finished surface, retro round keys and typewriter-like looks provide good balance between functional keyboard and vintage decoration. Best decors and functional keyboard for your office or home setups.

Multi-OS with Easy Switch Button: The keyboard is compatible with Mac OS, iOS, Windows and Android operating system and only simply tap on the switch button at the top right corner to change the configiration.

Pair up to 4 Devices with Seamless Switch: The keyboard supports 3 Bluetooth and 1 wired connectivity. Only simply press switch button at the top right corner to switch between Bluetooth and wired mode. (For more details about Bluetooth connectivity please scroll down to product description)
Responsive and Fluid Keystrokes for Heavy Users: All key anti-ghosting and lifespan of over 50 million clicks provide fluid and responsive typing experience for writers, gamers, coders, etc.

Beautiful White Lighting Effects: The various lighting effects allow you to type day or night while decorating your desktop setups . Only need to fiddle with the “return” bar and left-hand knob to change lighting effects and its brightness.

Long Lasting Battery: With 2000mah rechargeable battery only about 6 hours charging the keyboard has 16-hour continuouse working time (backlighting on). Note: Working time may vary based on use and computer conditions.

What You Get: 1 x Retro Typewriter Keyboard, 2 x Blue Switch, 1 x Metal Switch Puller, 1 x USB-C Cable for Charging/Connection, 1 x User Manual; 12-month warranty & a ready support team for any issues.

reviews.title: LOVE IT
reviews.text: I absolutely 💯 ♥️ love this keyboard! It reminds me of typing class in high school. If you want nostalgia this is your product. It does make a very satisfying loud clicking when typing so do not buy if you need something quiet. Now my sister wants one too!

reviews.title: I am in love
reviews.text: I never thought I can fall in love with a keyboard! This keyboard is esthetically beautiful. I love this clicking sound…not quite like the real typewriter but kinda close:)  Light effects make typing even more fun

reviews.title: Beautiful keyboard
reviews.text: The keyboard is absolutely unique and stunning, I just received it yesterday so I have not typed on it very much but it seems pretty heavy duty and the back lighting is awesome especially with bad eyesight, The return arm regulates the lights to make it very smooth to adjust, The typewriter knobs actually do the volume on your computer so all in all I do love the keyboard, The wireless feature actually was pretty easy to set up just read the instructions carefully!  I have never spent more than $40 on a keyboard and wireless mouse but I have to tell you well worth it.

reviews.title: nice build. aesthetically interesting looking.
reviews.text: I tried to return this thinking it has connectivity issues but troubleshot my way to realize it was OS messin' with me.  Glad I gave it a another whirl because it's really nice!  one thing it does do is the lower keys next to the space button are all the same height and my fat lower palm always hits them and sends me to the beginning of the sentence I'm writing.  Annoying and somewhat dangerous for my line of work but I solved it by putting elevation risers at the front raising it approximately another 8-10 degrees.  Would have been nice if it had elevation standoffs as standard equipment.  bluetooth on this is fantastic and responsive.

title: NPKC 104 87 61 Mixed Red Black PBT OEM Profile Keycap for 104 TKL 60% MX Switches Mechanical Gaming Keyboard (Only Keycap) (87 Side Print)

After Service If some keys missing or broken on the way,just leave us message,we will send you missing or broken ones soon.Don't worry about it and don't leave feedback immediately.

reviews.title: Looks like durgod k320
reviews.text: Awesome caps.  Looks exactly lie durgod k320

reviews.title: Very sturdy product. Was as described
reviews.text: I bought it as a gift for my grandson. Just what he wanted. Working good

reviews.title: Good Keycap Set! Beat Expectations
reviews.text:
I had initially bought this keycap set as a placeholder for my GMK Samurai Keycap set that I was set to receive. However, I had learned that Drop would ship them in late July, and since I was unsure if I was getting a refund, I bought this keycap set as a placeholder.

This keycap set broke all expectations that I held for cheap keycaps. They feel to be of good quality, with a high-ish thock sound that is what I wanted. Overall, it is a good keycap set that I would recommend to people if they are looking for good quality and good-sounding keycaps.

Also, I did get a refund for the GMK keycaps so I will be sticking with these keycaps, although they don't match as they were not meant to pair together and were rather a last-minute decision.

title: Kraken Keyboards Double Sleeved Custom Keyboard Cable with Aviator Connector, Fits Type-c, Micro USB, and USB-Mini Mechanical Keyboards (Green)

Kraken Keyboards Aviator Cable - Custom Keyboard Cable - Paracord USB cable
Our Kraken Aviator Keyboard Cable is the DRIP your setup needs!

reviews.title: I liked it very much until it started disconnecting
reviews.text:
I've only had it for a week and the type C end moves and it disconnects from my keyboard. it's not a lot but enough to power off my key board.

But, aside from that little piece of failure, i really like the sturdiness and the quality of the work on it. It's also at a great price. That's why i'm not returning this item, it's actually really good and as long as the cable is held in place it works great. Maybe it's my WFH wonky setup. I would buy more if i needed more cables, but I'm set for life with cables.

really nice cable, i would recommend to others.

reviews.title: Works great
reviews.text: Purchased for my son.  He says it works great.

reviews.title: Great upgrade for any Keyboard, best with custom rugged builds.
reviews.text: I wanted to get a substitute USB-C cable for my keyboard and found this listing. Was intrigued by the interchangeable inputs as well as the mechanical design. The price seemed steep, but the uses, ergonomics and possible durability of the cable seemed like a good investment. Mine came functional with an included "Kraken Keybaord" sticker, thank you! The only problem I found was that the USB-C male input was a tad long for my ANNE PRO Clone, a Dierya x Kemove DK61 60% Keyboard. It might be my keyboard's own build quality, or that maybe these cables are meant for more rugged custom boards. If I move my keyboard drastically it might disconnect, but luckily that rarely happens. I'm more than satisfied with the cable, more like enamored. I'd buy again for a future custom keyboard build for sure.

title: dagaladoo XVX 189 Keys Double Shot Keycaps, PBT Custom Keyboard Keycaps Full Set, XVX Profile Keycaps for 60% 65% 70% 100% Cherry Gateron MX Switches Mechanical Keyboard, Black/Purple
features: Full 189 keys PBT keycaps set, including 108 standard keys, 61 supplementary keys and 20 invert color supplementary keys for most 61/64/66/68/84/87/96/98/100/104/108 mechanical keyboards.
Double shot design keycaps, made from two colors material molded into each others, make the keycaps characters maintain the vibrance and saturation, clear and not fade.
XVX profile keycaps, ergonomic height design similar than Cherry profile, while increasing the contact surface between the finger and keycaps, bring you a comfortable typing experience.
Made from high content PBT material, 0.2cm extra-thick keycaps wall, which is provide top-notch durability, excellent touch and grease resistance.
Minimalist theme style and classic color matching, with a large number of personalized complement keys, you can DIY different styles of keyboards according to your own ideas.

reviews.title: Fits Royal Kludge 90% and Keychron K10!
reviews.text: I like all the extras. The quality of the PBT is grainy in texture, so if that's the kind of thing you're in to, then these won't disappoint. Not shine through, although the advertisement never claims they are. No light is coming through these from your board. The XVX profile is nice. Many extra key options- this set has fit several boards from several brands- not something you see for the price point! Quality printing and nice font on the caps. The keys feel good to type on when used with a clicky or linear switch. They are a bit heavy, so a lighter switch wouldn't be a bad option. I don't like to use these on tactile switches due to the mushy that these caps add to the keys. O Rings did not help these keys IMO.

reviews.title: Random assortment of loose keys
reviews.text: Expected a full set of keycaps, instead received a box containing three bags of loose keys, missing multiple letters, numbers, function keys, etc. Might be good for a concept art project, but not for a working keyboard.

reviews.title: Some keys misaligned with switch stems.
reviews.text: The keys have a nice touch, sound and printing however some keys, particularly my "O" key are a misaligned with the switch stem causing it to stick up a little higher than the "I" and "P" on either side. I did not mistake a "0" for an "O".

reviews.title: Seem to be good quality, but I hate the XVX profile
reviews.text:
These seems to be good quality keycaps, I have no issues with them at all. I have put them on multiple boards now, and I haven't had any break or scratch. Colors are accurate and legends are clear. No complaints there.

My one gripe is the XVX profile. It takes a lot of getting used to (like any new profile would), but the surface area of the keys is much larger than most other profiles. Therefore, when typing, it feels as if your fingers have to travel significantly further to reach the next key. It also makes it much, much easier to fat finger extra keys. If I had realized how much more surface area there was, I would not have purchased these. However, they do look great, they were cheap, and they sound pretty good too.

reviews.title: Great keycaps, andd even better customer service!
reviews.text: I wanted to find some PBT keycaps that were double-shot and gave some aesthetic flair to my $15 108 full sized mech keyboard with brown switches.  They fit just fine, and give a different, yet, pleasing sounds and feel to the keyboard.  I wanted non-see through keycaps in order to hide most of the LED rainbow glare.  The backlit effect is, again, very pleasing.  The keycap set that I originally ordered was missing the F9 key.  I contacted their customer service through Amazon, and got a reply back right away and arranged for a replacement set to be shipped out.  Got it the new set the day after, and it was complete.  Will purchase from this seller again whenever I need/want new keycaps.  Very confident if something is wrong, will be taken care of in a timely matter.

reviews.title: As expected
reviews.text: I was a bit wary because it's dye sub but the printing was perfect and came in exactly 2 weeks from China. Definitely better than the Akko EVA especially since the color on the Akko's are very noticeably lighter then pictures. I returned them the next day

reviews.title: really nice keycaps
reviews.text: i bought these because i always wanted pudding style keycaps for my rgb keyboard, they look really great and the light shines through really well. the quality and material is also good for the price

title: G.SKILL USB KM360 Professional Tenkeyless Mechanical Keyboard, Cherry MX Red, ABS Dual Injection Keycap, (Black)
description: The G.SKILL KM360 tenkeyless mechanical keyboard is a compact 87-key layout keyboard designed for durability. Featuring long-lasting Cherry MX mechanical keyswitches, wear-proof ABS double injection keycaps, and a solid aluminum top-plate, the KM360 mechanical keyboard is the perfect daily mechanical keyboard. With a detachable USB Type-C cable, it's easy to replace a worn cable by simply swapping it out with another USB Type-C cable of your choice.
features: CHERRY MX - Most popular mechanical keyswitch for their high standards of quality, reliability, and durability; rated for over 50 million keypresses.
COMPACT & PORTABLE - Designed with a detachable USB Type-C cable and a tenkeyless layout for more desk space and great portability.
WEAR-PROOF KEYS - Using ABS dual-injection keycaps mean the keys won't wear out like printed or laser etched keycaps.
HIGH DURABILITY - Constructed with a solid aluminum top plate and floating keyswitches for easy cleaning.
MODERN DESIGN - Featuring ergonomic keys, white LED backlight, and n-key rollover for comfort and ease of use.

reviews.title: Clicky clack who’s at the rack with the jackets? Me!
reviews.text:
I had been eyeing a mechanical keyboard for years, hesitant to buy one because A) I already had a perfectly fine working keyboard and B) Reviews I had read made it sound like they were so noisy you needed to wear ear protection while using one. During a recent move I left my previously mentioned perfectly fine working keyboard outside for an extended period of time, uncovered in the rain and sun and any other elements that rolled though Southern California for those few months. When I finally returned to the keyboard, I found that it had become yet another casualty of the pandemic. Finally I had good cause for a new keyboard, and my research led me to try this one. And like the famous tattoo says, I have no ragrets!

I plugged it in and immediately it lit up and off my little fingies went, zipping around the keyboard with the grace and elegance of a gold medal winning gymnast at the 2021 Tokyo Olympics. Every click and clack was like music to my ears, each sentence I typed sounding like a symphony composed by Mozart himself! I now look forward to typing my weekly emails to mother, catching her up with her favorite son’s (sorry Richard, but you know it’s true!) comings and goings!
I’ve only had this keyboard for about a week, so time will tell if it will hold up to the rigorous poundings that accompany each email I compose, but as of now I would not hesitate to recommend this keyboard to all my many (ok, zero) friends! Now I can’t wait to get off from my day job as a clerk typist and go home and get some typing in!

reviews.title: Great Initial Impression
reviews.text:
My first foray into mechanical KB and cherry switches. I was familiar with GSkill as they are a trusted brand in performance PC DDR4 RAM. I liked the price point and the size was perfect. Smaller than a full size but still having arrow keys and delete, etc off to the side.
I’m no KB expert, but it appears to be of good quality and finish. Nice adjustable LED backlighting. It has a sleeved nylon cable that’s white and matches the board nicely. Typing on it will take some getting used to, but I’m liking it so far and will update later if there’s any issues.

reviews.title: Amazing keyboard EDIT:
reviews.text: Amazing keyboard.  I'm typing on my new G.SKILL KM360 Professional Tenkeyless Mechanical Keyboard and YES it amazing!  Seriously if you have the money by this product.  Totally worth every penny! It's been just over a year since I got this mechanical keyboard & the USB type C is coming loose, I have to move the cord back N forth so it will connect again. Not sure if it can be fixed or not. (EDIT) I got this in October of 2019 & the small side of the USB Type-C female side is breaking off, causing the keyboard to flicker on and off. Other than that it's awesome keyboard

reviews.title: Great keyboard from a regular joe
reviews.text:
This is my first keyboard and saw great review. I’m not a big gamer or anything but recently started playing a little on a gaming laptop and thought why not. I thought the keyboard on the laptop were fine but damn these are better. I started using them for work and everything and love this key board now. So if your on the fence just do it.

10/10

reviews.title: Almost perfect
reviews.text: Exactly what I was looking for in an TKL board. The only thing that’s below standard are the kick stands. They don’t provide much resistance, so when you just nudge the keyboard forward the kickstands collapse - not sure if they need to be more sturdy or have a more grippy rubber foot but a rather disappointing feature to an otherwise perfect set up.

reviews.title: Great budget keycaps
reviews.text: Please don’t mind my cat lol she’s modeling the keyboard. Really great budget keycaps, super pretty color. I use aqua king switches and the sound with the keycaps is pretty good. Really like and enjoy them. P.S. the yellow keycaps ARE NOT part of the set, they are from another keycap set. I thought it would compliment the purple nicely :)

reviews.title: Nice keycaps, but holy crap they're snug
reviews.text:
These keycaps are probably best suited for soldered switches. If you're on a hot swap board, get ready to separate every key from the cap as you'll be pulling the entire assembly out EVERY TIME.

Other than my tolerance/keycap ripping issues these are solid and have a good sound indicative of a good pbt material.

reviews.title: Great keycap set, just wish they we're backlight compatible.
reviews.text: That's my fault, I always assume keycaps are backlight compatible but they feel awesome, love the satin touch, they look great, and the legend is super bright and clear. If you're not specifically looking for a keycap set to use with a backlit keyboard, this one looks great.

reviews.title: These keycaps feel and look awesome (for the price)
reviews.text:
I bought these keycaps for a cheap mechanical keyboard I had lying around. I had put some cheap keycaps of a similar price but a different brand on them earlier this year. Didn't like those keycaps at all.

These keycaps have a more pleasant texture, not smooth but not quite as grainy. I love love love the greyscale color scheme, and the blank keycaps are really aesthetically pleasing. Obviously, if you can't type without looking at your keyboard you should purchase the keycaps that come with all the lettering, it probably won't take away much from your experience.

One small note, I would suggest caution when using the included keycap puller. It scratched the side of my spacebar and left a little black line. Unfortunately, it is on the side of the keyboard that faces me, so now every time I sit down to type I will see the little black scratch. So be careful when pulling these off. Otherwise, I love these colors and will definitely consider buying other products from this brand based on this level of quality for price.

I forgot to mention. I loved the packaging on these keycaps!! The other brand I bought from had the keycaps all together in a ziplock bag. This brand had the keycaps arranged in order in sleeves and it was so much better for putting the keycaps on! ok that's all.

reviews.title: Not for Certain Noise
reviews.text:
Unfortunately these o-rings didn't help with the noise from my mechanical keyboard and switches. The noise from my keyboard comes from the sound the springs make when the button pops back up, and these o-rings work to muffle sound when the keys are pressed down. For keyboards with raised keys that don't bottom out, like mine, and for switches that make more noise when they come back up instead of when they go down, the o-rings are not effective for reducing noise.

Otherwise, the product is good, and I'm keeping the o-rings for when I eventually change out the switches on my keyboard entirely.

reviews.title: awesome!

reviews.text: These cut down the travel and damp the clicks in my moonlander, great value.

reviews.title: Good value rings kit
reviews.text:
I was setting up two keyboards with lighter switches, and think that o-rings are important when you drop the force. This kit was a good value, and I like the brushes to clean the keyboards.

I would recommend a decent set of tweezers to push the rings down onto the key posts. I had a plastic set that was perfect for it ( they came with a pair of Moondrop IEMs ).

reviews.title: Not doublshot
reviews.text:
These two keys: < and > have already worn through. These are not double shot keycaps. They are a semi-translucent keycap with a finish over it that wears through. Doubleshot has an injection molded insert inside the keycap with the translucent area cut out of the keycap.
Should you not care about that, here is some more info. They look okay in the light, but in the dark there is a strong screen glare off of them that can be distracting.

I rate one star for lying about the nature of the product.

reviews.title: Arrived missing key caps but overall pretty good if you have the right keyboard
reviews.text:
Not a keyboard, just key caps to "bling out" your existing keyboard.

I purchased the following keyboard and these key caps fit perfectly. The keyboard (not this item, which is only key caps) comes with a red plastic tool that you can use to pop out the key caps:

Redragon K551 Mechanical Gaming Keyboard RGB LED Rainbow Backlit Wired Keyboard with Red Switches for Windows Gaming PC (104 Keys, Black)

Even the font on the key caps matches the keyboard I bought separately, and the backlighting shines through the font.

The only down side: the set of key caps is missing about 1/4 of the keys (see attached picture).

I would give it all five stars if it had arrived containing all the key caps advertised in the product listing. It was a surprise prank gift for a coworker, which is why I made do with what we got.

reviews.title: Constant spring buzzing
reviews.text:
The keyboard is very visually appealing. I do not know if my lack of keyboard knowledge is why I give this 4/5 stars, but there are a few features I do not like. Starting with the positives, the backlight (light blue not changeable) is very appealing and not hard on the eyes, the swappable red switches are nice because I like red, and the linear red switches mean it has a nice click noise when typing. Moving into the cons, there is a bit that is annoying. The most notable, and would probably lower the rating more if I wasn't nice, is the spring noises from the keys. There is a buzzing noise that is left if a key is tapped too hard. This can be fixed by buying lube, but annoying nonetheless. Another feature is the lack of hotkey commands. I write a bit of papers and I usually have multiple tabs open. Trying to hotkey a tab to the left or right side of my screen doesn't work because to use arrow keys, the fn key needs to be held and that doesn't work for the windows hotkey: win+arrow_key. Another annoying hotkey feature is the 'del' key which is fn+n. The n key is in a bit of a bad spot to use the 'delete'' function. Of course, these can all be changed by editing the layers of the keyboard, but it is a long and annoying process that I have not taken the time to do yet. The last issue is the key colors. At night, seeing the gray keys, with the backlight on, is a bit difficult. The second photo attached also has extra keys added, not all of them can be attached to the keyboard because there isn't a spot for it (a bit weird but ok).

Pros:
nice backlight (not changeable color)
clacking linear red switches
extra switch colors

Cons:
Spring noise
keyboard's default button layer
hard to see switches at night

reviews.title: I don't believe but, I got too! I'm looking right at it.
reviews.text:
I didn't expect much for under $23 when I got it at the end of 2022. I figured it I'd get a couple of weeks of fun out of it and figure out if I like the form factor.

When I took it out of the box it didn't look the same as in the photo. Well, you get an extra set of keys! Not every key but, nothing to sneeze at!

It feels good and been holding up well! Other than a squeaky space bar. No issues. Got used to the FN usage and key placement. It's really an amazing value even at $30. I'm sure it's not as premium as the $80+ keyboards but, the value is here!

reviews.title: Quite decent for the price - better quality than I expected
reviews.text:
I was skeptical about purchasing this combo because of the cheap price and the sketchy reviews, but I'll admit I'm impressed. I only spent $22.50 for the entire combo (used/refurbished). I expected the mouse to be dirt cheap from what the reviews were saying, but it feels quite solid to me. I played some Boarderlands and some League of Legends on the combo last night and it was comfortable and they both held up well. The mouse has a dpi changer that works great. For me personally I think it may have too many modes (somewhere around 4 or 5). I personally just like having 2 or 3 because when you're in game it gets complicated to remember which dpi setting you are on and cycle through to the correct one all within a few seconds.

They keyboard isn't overly bright. It is kind of is hard to read the keys at an angle, but other than that, it seems to be a great keyboard so far.

This is a good buy, for the low price of $20-30, for a basic gamin setup.

Typing is also decently comfortable, just takes some getting used to since I am used to flat keys.

reviews.title: Poor quality - lasted about 3 months.
reviews.text: died after 3 months.  very disappointing because this was quite expensive.  I've had another gaming keyboard for over 3 years and it is still working.  Buy the Razor instead.  Backlit keyboard was nice while it lasted...

reviews.title: Five Stars
reviews.text: Works great and honestly the best keyboard I've used and I love the adjustable weights on the mouse!

reviews.title: Great key functionality
reviews.text:
I love, love, love this keyboard. The feel of the keys as they are pressed is great. I'm an old school typer (keyboarder) and I feel like these give me the feeling I was missing. I think I even type faster with this keyboard. I am not a gamer so I don't use it for those thing.
I bought this based on a review that was done on Craft Computing on YouTube.

reviews.title: Amazing gaming & multitasking keyboard – improved my gaming and my everyday typing.
reviews.text:
I purchased this keyboard to go with my first custom-built gaming rig that I built around 2 months ago. I had been getting so frustrated with my old standard Logitech keyboard and I wanted an upgrade. I am not new to gaming, but this was my first ‘serious’ build, so I went with the advice of many of my more experienced friends and purchased a mechanical keyboard.

I needed a keyboard that could multitask as well. I work as a web developer, and I am in grad school for marketing – I do a lot of typing. So I wanted something that was going to last and perform in all of these uses – and still improve my gaming experience. After doing a TINY bit of keyboard research, I chose the blue switches since I do a lot more “regular typing” than gaming.

I’ve had the keyboard for about 2 days, and in that time I’ve used it to play the DOOM Multiplayer Beta, and several hours of Fallout 4. So far this morning I’ve written 2 blog posts, one paper, and now this review :D.

My first impression of this product was it was HEAVY. Not in a bad way, just in a very sturdy was that was a sharp contrast to what I had had before in my standard keyboard. Since this is a desktop keyboard, there’s no need for this keyboard to be light. The other thing I noticed was the high quality braided USB cable. I must’ve missed that feature when I ordered because I was pleasantly surprised – the USB connector is also gold plated. I did not expect that for such a low price point of around $100. (Note: I did receive a discount on the product in exchange for my honest review.)

I also received this keyboard exceptionally fast. I ordered on a Thursday afternoon and got it Saturday morning – no Saturday delivery fee!

**Important** So the package comes with a guide that is very concise – pay attention! I got confused when I didn’t get a ‘new hardware found’ notification like the manual said. However, the rest of the instructions worked fine, so it must not have mattered. I’m on Windows 10.

I was surprised to find that the shortcut keys (like for volume and track control) worked without any software at all. To access the different light settings, you just press FN and select the pattern from the keyboard itself. I settled on FN+0 – It’s a responsive setting that lights up the keys you type and then lets them fade – very cool since I don’t want to have the keyboard lit all the time. I’ll admit though – this thing is pretty, when I leave my desk I’ve been quickly pressing FN+Ins to get it to do the wave effect if I’m gonna be away for a while.

So that’s just the extra stuff – let’s talk about the performance. I can without a doubt say this keyboard has made a difference in my playing. The game mode is essential – make sure you enable that when you launch a game. The DOOM multiplayer beta was probably a bad gauge since that game is ridiculously hard anyway – but I noticed a marked difference in my performance on Fallout 4. I’m not going to pretend to be a keyboard expert, all I can say is that the response time was way better.

And I am SO glad I went with blue switches. Writing papers, I feel like an old world typist – the mechanical and audible feedback I get from typing is so satisfying. I have noticed reduced typos from ‘accidental’ slips. The audible click sound doesn’t really sound like the bulky old keyboards, it’s more of a quick, clean clicking. It isn’t loud, but it’s NOT whisper quiet, which I prefer.

Pros:
- The rubber feet keep it in place on my desk (I am one of those crazy people who don’t use a slide-out keyboard tray).
- The keyboard is study, and well made. A great value for the money.
- No special software needed to change effects and settings, everything is controlled on the keyboard, and the instructions are only 1 page.
- The game features are useful! Locking the windows key, consecutive attack mode.
- Custom patterns – this is essential when gaming. I used it to highlight the keys used when playing.
- Excellent physical and audible feedback when typing – extremely satisfying.
- The confidence that comes with the 50 million actuation lifecycle (I type a LOT)

Cons:
- There weren’t any instructions on what to do if you never got the ‘new hardware found’ message when plugging in the keyboard. This confused me ' but I figured it out. If this happens to you – just proceed with the manual, as far as I can tell, it makes no difference.
- As far as I can tell, you can’t make ALL the keys light up one color. I might be overlooking something though. This might be a con for some.

I would say this keyboard is perfect for someone like me who wants a serious gaming keyboard, but is ultimately a multitasker. You will definitely notice a difference if switching from a non-mechanical keyboard.
The quality of this keyboard has me anxious to try other GAMDIAS products, and I highly recommend it to anyone looking for an upgrade!

reviews.title: Spacebars do not fit well
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:14b0c07be1bf5b90e20f388d925ce8c8]] The keycap set is great in terms of design, modifier key size options, and key legend for quality for price. Fitting for all keys is great, excepts for the large spacebars.
The space bars (both 6.25u and 7u) in my set don’t work smoothly and somehow get the stabs stuck (two different kinds of stabs as well). I tried them on two keyboards (one with 7u and other with 6.25u) and only these spacebars showed problems and the other spacebars I have do not show this problem. I am not sure really whats causing the space bar issue, maybe those pbt space keycaps are slightly bent (as I have read about) but visually they look okay.

reviews.title: Good Quality for the $ - Fits Cherry MX Switches
reviews.text:
This fit my Ducky mechanical keyboard without issue. They seem to be well made and fit tightly in my cherry MX switches. A couple observations, not sure it’s a positive or a negative but a point of observation:

1) They do not come with media key replacements. The blue ones you see in my image are from my original key caps

2) The height of the keys are slightly shorter than my Ducky OEMs. While initially this was a possible concern for me, having typed with the new keys for a couple weeks, seems to not impact typing at all.

3) The blue caps that came with the replacements are not the ones you see in my photo (Enter key). They have a slightly yellow / blue hue to them vs. the Ducky’s I’m using. Wanted my enter key to match the rest of the blue media keys so I mixed and matched. Some may like the blue that comes with the set, I just preferred my original blue keys color.

For the price, they fit the bill, can’t complain. We’ll see long term how the printing of the keys holds up / how quickly they wear down.

Wish list:

- Caps lock key had the word ‘Caps’ on it
- Windows button keys had something besides “Super”.

Overall good purchase.

reviews.title: Good quality!
reviews.text: The thickness is nice and has a good feel when typing. I personally like the font on these keys compared to a lot of the others found on Amazon. It's very clean and sleek. The colors are very pastel though, so in some lightings it's hard to differentiate between the two colors as there's not much contrast. I eventually just switched out the pastel purple caps for darker purple caps I already had. Overall they're really nice and fit my Anne Pro 2 perfectly. (Bonus: The case for storing the keys is also pretty fancy).

reviews.text:
I put them on a Quisan Magicforce 68 key mechanical keyboard. The legends and not as pronounced / readable as the stock key caps, they also seat closer to the board which leads to a shorter key press. Quite happy with the product for the price. They feel very nice.

Look grey in the photos but are bright white.

reviews.text: A great replacement for any stock ABS keycaps! Not the highest quality PBT, but still thicker than ABS and its doubleshot with clean text. Some compatibility issues with space bar and shift keys(or any larger keys), due to these not having stabalizers. So they wiggle a little bit. But not uncomfortable or hard to use if you deal with it.

reviews.text: These key caps are as advertised. Very high quality key caps with a variety of colors available. Was shipped in a very organize box with the keys all separated so you dont have to dig through the box to find any particular keys. So far I am satisfy with the product. Will see how it holds up

reviews.title: Five Stars
reviews.text: Excellent keycaps for the price..

title: GTSP 9009 XDA Retro PBT Keycaps Set for Gaming Keyboard Dye-Sub for Cherry Mx Gateron Kailh Switch GK61/GK68 60% Mechanical Keyboard (9009-XDA)
features: ✅【What You Get】-1x133 thick PBT Keycap set. It’s only keycaps, no keyboard included
✅ 【Widely Compatible】-9009 keycaps with 6.25U spacebar can fit for 61/87/104/108/84/68 mechanical keyboard
✅【XDA Profile Keycaps】-The XDA keycap has a larger surface contact, and the touch area of the finger is also larger. The uniform profile which is perfect for ortho linear ergonomic
✅ 【PBT & DYE SUBLIMATION】-Compared with ABS, PBT has better high hardness, wear resistance and high temperature resistance. Dye Sublimation makes the font of keycaps clear and non-fade
✅ 【Switch Compatibility】-Standardized MX compatible with most MX switches. e.g. Cherry MX switches and clones including Gateron, Halo, and Kaihua

reviews.title: Space bar was too big:( still cute tho
reviews.text: The keys are so cute! I love it! The only downside was that the space bar was too big for my keyboard!! It was also too big on my brothers keyboard, so that’s a little weird. So sad about it too since that was the main reason why I got it:(

reviews.title: Really cheap look and feel
reviews.text:
These are really cheap. I know you might be thinking, you get what you pay for and these are cheaply priced. However, at the end of the day, keycaps are just plastic and the good ones are just waaay over priced.

First thing first, the actual color differs from the picture. The picture has a nice looking matcha green, the actual product is a little darker green and no where as vibrant. Also, some of the legends on the keycaps are kind of blurry. I am noticing the blurriness on all the non-alpha caps. You can tell these are really cheap and they look pretty bad.

title: Metal Switch Opener GPL 205G0 0.35oz, Lubrication Oil Mechanical Keyboard Keycaps Aluminum Alloy Opener Instantly for Cherry mx Switches
description: As an indispensable tool for custom players, I think you will often use the switch opener, which can be placed on your workbench. Then this ultra-high-value and super-feeling opener will be your best choice, it can open any cherry switch, and the switch body similar to the cherry switch structure. It can turn on the switch in one second without any lag. We have tested and improved it several times. Compared with other switch openers, it has more personality, adds more surprising details, and is more smooth to use. This set includes a switch opener, as 4 Prong tool and a lubed brush. Compared to holding the switch by hand, I believe that the 4 Prong tool is a better choice for you. It can make your work process more professional and faster. The lubed Brush is slender and precise, and it can find exactly where you need lubrication. Product packaging:A Metal Switch Opener A 4 Stem Holder  A Lube Brush A GPL 205G0
features: 【GPL 205G0】It is enough to lubricate 300 switches. 205 grease can be used on satellite and balance bar.
【Switch Opener】This keyboard switch opener is made of aluminum alloy material, using anodizing process, matte texture, and never fading.
【Convenient】 It includes complete set of accessories, you can have all tools at one time.This is a perfect accessory set for those who like to mod their switches.
【Package Includes】1 pcs GPL 205G0, 1 pcs Metal Switch Opener, 1 pcs Stem Holder, 2 pcs Lube brushes.
【Warm Tips】This switch opener can only be used for cherry switch, temporarily not suitable for other switches.

reviews.title: Gamer kid loves this!
reviews.text: Bought as a gift for my gamer teen, and they love it! The kids are all into the clickity clack of keyboard sounds, and hers is so great now that her friends are asking her to clean and lube their keyboards and paying her to do it! Awesome product!

reviews.title: Almost everything you'll need to start fixing your keyboard.
reviews.text:
I was able to use this to make a 'cheap' Corsair board sound like a $300 board. The only other thing that would have made this a perfect kit is maybe a switch puller?

Definitely worth the price and the seller was quick to replace my missing items.

title: YUNZII Keynovo V2 Coiled Keyboard Cable with Aviator USB Cable for Type-C Mechanical Gaming Keyboard (White)
features: * 【MULTIPLE COLOR CHOICES】Every keyboard needs a cable. The Keynovo V2 coiled keyboard cable features various striking color setups. It's got all the features you need, and it comes easy to match your different keyboard setups.

【4 PINS AVIATOR & EASY INSTALLATION 】the coiled keyboard cable features a detachable 4 pins metal aviator port to support a wide range of connections. The keyboard cable takes USB-A side with metal aviation, Type-C plug, two-section cable connection, and detachable design. The coiled keyboard cable delivers a high-performance in every aspect, elegant addition to any setup.

【 HIGH-PERFORMANCE QUALITY】This performance-tested keyboard cable with a flexible coiled design, metal aviator, durable TPE material. It delivers superior and high-end quality and visual aesthetics. The cable is an ideal replacement cable for any mechanical keyboard.

【LONGER LENGTH AND WIDER COMPATIBILITY】The V2 custom coiled aviator cable has upgraded length wit 155cm straight cable, and 14cm coiled cable. The total length of the cable reaches 170cm. The coil cable diameter is 2cm. Compared to last version, the upgraded V2 keyboard cable can be compatible with most mechanical keyboard, e.g KC84.

* ONLY CABLE INCLUDED!【USB-C INTERFACE, USB 2.0/3.0 COMPATIBLE】Designed to work flawlessly with any USB type C device, the USB to Type-C coiled aviator cable works with mechanical gaming keyboard and type-c mobile phones charging.

reviews.title: Decent. Kind of small coil.
reviews.text:
YUNZII AKKO Coiled Keyboard Cable with Aviator USB Cable for Type-C Mechanical Gaming Keyboard (Sakura)

This cable just ok. It's not bad but definitely lacks the quality feel of others. The coil is small around 1/2" outer diameter. The connections are good and fit in my keyboard well and the aviator cable looks good. For me, the cable from the coil to the USBc connector is a bit too long and looks kind of weird being so far away from the keyboard. Also, the coil just looks like an old phone coiled cable. It just isn't for me, but the price is good, and it doesn't look half bad.

title: DROP + Matt3o MT3 Susuwatari Custom Keycap Set, ABS Hi-Profile Keycaps, Doubleshot Legends, Cherry MX Compatible Set for Ortholinear Mechanical Keyboards (Ortholinear)
features: A GROUNDBREAKING PROFILE, BACK FOR MORE: Sculpted in Hi-Profile, Matt3o’s groundbreaking MT3 /dev/tty custom keycap set changed the way we type.

FROM THE IBM TERMINAL TO THE DESKTOP: Based on the profile form the iconic IBM beamspring terminals of the 1970s, this custom set is fully sculpted in Hi-Profile. From its heavily slanted design to the scooped, contoured tops of each cap, the set recreates the feel of vintage keyboards.

DOUBLESHOT LEGENDS: As opposed to a dye-sublimiation process, these doubleshot legends are permanently molded inside the keycap, thus becoming an integral part of it. This ensures reliable legends and continuity throughout the set.
ORTHOLINEAR: For ortho keyboards like the Drop Planck, Preonic, and other boards with similar layouts.
SPECS: Produced by Drop and designed by Matt3o, ABS Hi-Profile MT3 keycaps, Doubleshot legends, MX compatible, and Fully sculpted based on IBM beamspring keycaps.

reviews.title: Absolute necessity on ortholinear boards
reviews.text:
These keycaps are thick, double shot so they will never fade, and sculpted. With ortholinear keyboards, these keycaps really help adjusting to smaller modifer key size and different key layout.

Pros:
1. Thick: This helps lower the pitch of the sound, which makes it sound quieter.
2. Doubleshot ABS: No wearing out the legends. The font is also fairly thick, making it much more legible than some other keycaps.
3. MT3 profile: The sculpted profile really makes it very comfortable to use and helps reduce hitting the wrong keys. No sharp edges due to the spherical shape. Very enjoyable for typing. The profile is much higher though so that could be an issue for some people.
4. Multiple profile options for certain keys: For example, the Ctrl and Esc keycs come in profiles that would allow it to be the top row or 3rd row. Space bar comes as two 1u, two 1.5u, and one 2u.
5. Storage tray and box: This seems silly to put as a pro but the tray and box it comes with make it easy to store unused or keycaps it replaced. Other Keycaps come in a zip lock bag that will just be a jumbled mess.

Cons:
1. Price. This is really expensive for a set of keycaps but this is the normal price for any specialty keycaps. It is what it is.
2. Limitation of scultped profile: Putting key profiles meant for row 1 in row 3 feels awkward so you might end you designing your keymap partially based on keycap profiles. Also might end up rotating some keycaps like row 5 Raise or Lower layer keycaps to make it more comfortable.
3. ABS option only. The PBT version is in white only. So if you prefer the color with the material that it isn't made it, then you're out of luck.
4. Limited to buying sets if you need extra keys: If you need more keys, you have to order a set. I would like to have more 1.5u blank keycaps but don't want to buy multiple sets just for the few pieces I want.

reviews.title: I like them
reviews.text:
These are my daily drivers, I use them on a Drop CTRL with Glorious Panda switches. Initially I thought the MT3 profile was disorienting, but after using them for a while, I am quite fond of it. I acknowledge that not everyone will like this profile though, and that should be considered if you are buying this product (or any like it). If you can find an MT3 set to try first before dumping about two hundred dollars on keycaps, it would be a **very good** idea. Other things go without saying, the thickness is very good the weight on my switches feels good and not like its making keys too easy to press or anything. I really like the theme, but all of that considered, I bought this specifically for the VI keys (hjkl with arrows) because I thought they looked super cool.

The price for these keycaps is a good deterrent for most people, for good reason. However this high of a price is pretty standard for high quality keycaps, as well as the Drop.com-exclusive MT3 profile.

This leads me to the value for money, its expensive and definitely should only be bought if you have a hankering to spend money on some expensive keycaps or you really really like having a specific row of keycaps.
Brightness is a 1 star because they're not shine-through keycaps, as they should be.
Gaming is a 4 star because, like, Sure? nothing about these keycaps keep you from gaming.

reviews.title: Best 3rd party caps I've ever owned.
reviews.text:
I really liked the esthetics of these key caps because I was looking for something which resembled "Old Nasa" feel, and these were the best I could find. The ergonomics were also great and everything has a very nice and snug fit, unlike the original keycaps that came with my CTRL keyboard.

I only wish that the "additional" buttons came with the normal key caps for the money I spent on the original "package". $30 for about 10 extra keys I can use on my ten keyless is VERY steep.

reviews.title: Best keycap set
reviews.text: I love this set. Worth every penny.

reviews.title: Absolutely gorgeous
reviews.text: Wonderful keycaps , goes great on my Nyquist Keyboard, looks professional yet custom, I highly recommend.
